creator: Torsten.Grust@uni-konstanz.de
text:
Greetings.

Update of the FreeBSD port for hugs-1.4 (port has been renamed on 
MASTER_SITE as well as updated).

Output of `diff -uNr hugs-1.4-old hugs-1.4' included below.  The files

	patches/
	patches/patch-aa
	patches/patch-ab

turned out to be obsolete now and have been removed.  Additionally, I 
uploaded the new port to 

	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/hugs-1.4.tar.gz


Cheers,
	--Teggy
